All chemicals used for the preparation of the title compound were reagent grade quality. To a solution of 4-methoxybenzaldehyde (3 mmol) and o -aminothiophenol (6 mmol) in diethylether (10 mL) silica gel (3 g) was added ( Scheme 1 ). The slurry was mixed thoroughly and the solvent was removed by rotary evaporation. The resultant solid was subjected to microwave irridation using microwave oven operating at 300W for 6 min. After cooling, the product was extracted with ethyl acetate. The extract was then filtered and the filtrate was evaporated under reduced pressure to yield the crude product.
